fada-6.command: set -a && source /etc/environment && set +a && export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && cd /home/ubuntu/fada-v3 && python3 experiments/framework_comparison/wrappers/train_llamafactory.py --model google/paligemma2-3b-pt-448 --train-data data/vlm_training/gt_train_sharegpt_abs.jsonl --val-data data/vlm_training/gt_val_sharegpt_abs.jsonl --data-root "data/Fetal Ultrasound" --output-dir /home/ubuntu/fada-results/llamafactory_paligemma2-3b --config experiments/framework_comparison/config_multimodal.json && if [ -d /home/ubuntu/fada-results/llamafactory_paligemma2-3b/adapter ]; then bash experiments/framework_comparison/eval_adapter.sh google/paligemma2-3b-pt-448 /home/ubuntu/fada-results/llamafactory_paligemma2-3b/adapter /home/ubuntu/fada-results/llamafactory_paligemma2-3b/eval; fi

fada-8.command: set -a && source /etc/environment && set +a && export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH && cd /home/ubuntu/fada-v3 && python3 experiments/framework_comparison/wrappers/train_llamafactory.py --model google/paligemma-3b-pt-448 --train-data data/vlm_training/gt_train_sharegpt_abs.jsonl --val-data data/vlm_training/gt_val_sharegpt_abs.jsonl --data-root "data/Fetal Ultrasound" --output-dir /home/ubuntu/fada-results/llamafactory_paligemma-3b --config experiments/framework_comparison/config_multimodal.json --keep-cache && if [ -d /home/ubuntu/fada-results/llamafactory_paligemma-3b/adapter ]; then bash experiments/framework_comparison/eval_adapter.sh google/paligemma-3b-pt-448 /home/ubuntu/fada-results/llamafactory_paligemma-3b/adapter /home/ubuntu/fada-results/llamafactory_paligemma-3b/eval; fi
